Offset.desc: Gives the state a sprite offset for HUD / weapon sprites. Offset(0, 0) keeps the previous offset (does not reset). Default ready position is (0, 32).

params.name: x
params.desc: Horizontal offset. Positive = right, negative = left. Default 0 (centered).

params.name: y
params.desc: Vertical offset. Larger = lower on screen. Default ready Y is 32.

Bright.desc: Always renders the sprite at full brightness, ignoring sector light.

Fast.desc: State duration is halved when the actor is in fast mode (e.g. nightmare).

Slow.desc: State duration is doubled when the actor is in slow mode.

NoDelay.desc: Prevents the one-tic delay before the first action in Spawn. Only valid immediately after Spawn:.

CanRaise.desc: Allows the actor to enter its Raise state from this state when resurrected.

Light.desc: Attaches dynamic light(s) defined in GLDEFS to this state.
